name: Merry Gingerbread Men
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until creamy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until fluffy.
3. Add egg; beat until light and fluffy.
4. Blend in molasses.
5. Sift together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg.
6. Add to creamed mixture; blend well.
7. Stir in oats.
8. Chill dough at least 1 hour.
9. Roll out on a lightly floured board or canvas to 1/8-inch thickness.
10. Cut with a floured gingerbread man cutter.
11. Place on greased cookie sheets.
12. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 10 to 12 minutes, until set.
13. Cool completely.
14. Decorate with confectioners' sugar frosting, red cinnamon candies, semi-sweet chocolate pieces, and currants.
Source: Our Favorites for family and friends
Reprinted with permission from The Quaker Oats Company
